# General Project Rules
- Write clean, semantic HTML5 and modern, responsive CSS.
- Prioritize a minimalist, tech-focused design aesthetic.
- Ensure all pages include the main Navbar.
- Use CSS variables (`:root`) for color palettes to support future theming.

# Code Style
- Keep JavaScript modular and well-commented.
- For backend or logic snippets (e.g., Go, C++, or scripts), follow standard idiomatic formatting and handle errors explicitly.
- Use English for code (variables, commits) and Ukrainian for content.
